headline: 2 hours back. Every single day.
primary_text: "I used to chart until 8pm. Now I'm done when my last client leaves." — Licensed therapist, 3 months with JotPsych. AI-powered clinical documentation that learns your style and writes notes from session recordings. Saves 1-2 hours daily. Your EMR, but human. HIPAA-compliant for behavioral health.
review_notes: Ad does not follow the design components of JotPsych. The branding is off.
